name: Holy Bells
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on buildings owned.
formula: +(1.6 * x ^ 0.4), where x is buildings owned

name: Angelic Determination
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on spells cast this Era. Increase Angel Coins found by 500%.
formula: (4 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is spells cast this Era

name: Angel Feathers
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance additively based on active spells.
formula: +(10 * x)%, where x is active spells

name: Angelic Wisdom
effect: Decrease cost of all spells by 50%. Increases offline spell cast amount based on offline Mana Regeneration.
formula: (10 * log10(1 + x))%, where x is offline Mana Regen

name: Magical Gates
effect: Increase Maximum Mana based on time spent as Good this Reincarnation.
formula: +(3.5 * x ^ 0.7), where x is Good time this Reincarnation

name: Wings of Liberty
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Mana Regeneration.
formula: (4 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is Mana Regeneration

name: Angelic Fortress
effect: Increase maximum Mana based on highest Holy Sites built this Reincarnation.
formula: +(x ^ 1.05), where x is highest Holy Sites this Reincarnation

name: Sacred Ground
effect: Increase spell duration based on time spent as Order this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.5 * x ^ 0.5)%, where x is Order time this Reincarnation

name: Divine Providence
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration multiplicatively based on spells cast this Era.
formula: (1.5 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is spells cast this Era
